body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
This PR unifies `parsed_args` and the EDMF model config, and adds support for an additional TOML file via CLI option.
 closes #1340.

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->
Clean up code, add testing for parsed_args.
Get feedback.

## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
1. Adds CLI options for a TOML file.
2. Parses the optional TOML file and merges `parsed_args` into the resulting `toml_dict`. `parsed_args` overrides in case of clashes.
3. Unifies the EDMF `config_params` and `parsed_args` into a `config` Dict used to store model configurations. This is created from the `toml_dict`. `config` then overwrites the `parsed_args` Dict in driver. This is done for two reasons: to keep the current `parsed_args` functionality without introducing bugs, and to allow the override TOML file to set model configurations, not just parameters.
4. Adds a TOML file for running the SCM EDMF Bomex cases, modifies the pipeline to use this file.

<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Add arg parsing for a TOML file, unify with parsed_args
